governanceUpdateNote: On 2026-07-20 the repository status was reconciled with actual GitHub history through merged PR #39. PR #35 was closed without merge and PR #29 remains a stale superseded PR.
currentMilestone: Multi-colony vertical slice and faction runtime art

currentBatch.extensionReason: The fleet, colonization, multi-colony and logistics systems were stable, and the generated faction art could be integrated without changing simulation contracts.

deliveredCapabilities: GitHub Actions CI and GitHub Pages deployment
deterministic simulation commands, events, clock, replay and checksum
IndexedDB persistence core, autosave, manual slots, import/export and recovery
schema-v9 saves with multi-colony, intelligence and debris state
resource economy with energy, population, stability and storage
deterministic building, research, ship and defense queues
serialized fleets with transport, deployment, scout, attack, recycle and colonize missions
deterministic combat, battle reports, debris, plunder and recycling
colonization technology and playable multi-colony empire management
origin-aware fleet logistics planner with cargo, route and fuel validation
generated Aegis runtime buildings, ships and defense atlases
generated hero, emblem and background art for Aegis, Synod and Veyra
runtime-compatible Synod and Veyra atlases staged for faction switching
procedural SVG fallback retained for technologies and effects
persistent six-PR delivery and AI handoff protocol
knownLimitations: new-game faction selection and faction-specific simulation catalogs are not implemented
the current playable production catalog still uses Aegis definitions
Synod and Veyra buildings, ships and defenses are staged but not selected by player faction yet
technology, effect and incomplete UI-state artwork still uses procedural CSS or SVG fallback
autonomous bots, dynamic market and later roadmap systems are not implemented
public Pages deployment should be checked after material UI batches
